zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Stafford於1345年出生在英國斯塔福爾卡素 邱奇時，她的父親Sir John De Stafford of Bramshall43歲，母親Elizabeth Somerville34歲。她於1371年與Sir John II de Warenne, Baron of Poynton and Stockport在英國諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1418年4月6日在英國爾奧維 奧福享年73歲，埋葬在英國爾奧維 奧福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Stafford于1345年出生在英国斯塔福爾卡素 邱奇时，她的父亲Sir John De Stafford of Bramshall43岁，母亲Elizabeth Somerville34岁。她于1371年与Sir John II de Warenne, Baron of Poynton and Stockport在英国諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1418年4月6日在英国爾奧維 奧福享年73岁，埋葬在英国爾奧維 奧福。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Stafford was born in 1345, in Castle Church, Staffordshire, England, her father, Sir John De Stafford of Bramshall, was 43 and her mother, Elizabeth Somerville, was 34. She married Sir John II de Warenne, Baron of Poynton and Stockport in 1371, in Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 6 April 1418, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in Over Peover, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Stafford est née en 1345, à Castle Church, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John De Stafford of Bramshall, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Somerville, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John II de Warenne, Baron of Poynton and Stockport en 1371, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 avril 1418, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Stafford 1345 in Castle Church, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John De Stafford of Bramshall 43 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Somerville 34. Sie hat 1371 in Nottinghamshire, England Sir John II de Warenne, Baron of Poynton and Stockport geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. April 1418 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Over Peover, Cheshire, England und wurde in Over Peover, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Stafford è nata il nel 1345 nel Castle Church, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Sir John De Stafford of Bramshall, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Somerville, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Sir John II de Warenne, Baron of Poynton and Stockport nel 1371, nel Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 6 aprile 1418, nel Over Peover, Cheshire, England, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Over Peover, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Staffordが1345年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアカストル チャーチで生まれた時，父Sir John De Stafford of Bramshallは43歳，母Elizabeth Somervilleは34歳であった。1371年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでSir John II de Warenne, Baron of Poynton and Stockportと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1418年4月6日にイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーで73歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Stafford(이)가 1345년 영국 스태퍼드실르 카스틀 c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John De Stafford of Bramshall(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Somerville(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1371년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 Sir John II de Warenne, Baron of Poynton and Stockport(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1418년 4월 6일 영국 체실르 버 p오버에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 버 p오버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Stafford nasceu em 1345, em Castle Church, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John De Stafford of Bramshall, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Somerville, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John II de Warenne, Baron of Poynton and Stockport em 1371, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de abril de 1418, em Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Stafford родилась в 1345 г. в местности кастл чурч, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John De Stafford of Bramshall было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Somerville, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John II de Warenne, Baron of Poynton and Stockport в 1371 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 6 апреля 1418 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Stafford nació en 1345, en Castle Church, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John De Stafford of Bramshall, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Somerville, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Sir John II de Warenne, Baron of Poynton and Stockport en 1371, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 6 de abril de 1418, en Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
